headline: Car detailing menu
note: Prices are starting prices and may vary by vehicle size and condition.

categories.name: Exterior Services
categories.summary: Clean exterior services for road film, wheels, glass, and paint shine.

categories.name: Interior Services
categories.summary: Interior reset options for seats, mats, panels, touchpoints, and odors.

categories.name: Full Packages
categories.summary: Bundled detail packages for a more complete inside-and-out finish.

categories.name: Add-Ons
